title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
FOMC June minutes (19:00 UTC): hawkish — 9/18 officials back a 2026 rate hike; Sep hike odds 66%.
Warsh withheld his dot-plot projection (makes minutes the only on-record signal on Sep).
BTC retreated to ~$62,240 on the news (-2.7% 24h).
Next: CPI June prints Tue 14 Jul 08:30 ET.
